## Type

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / dependencies
- [ ] `refactor` — code change (no new feature, no bug fix)
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
